title: StormSummonerDeviceExtensions
description: Authoring/reference schema for the Storm Summoner 'x_' extension fields layered on top of the read-only Open MIDI RTC schema (open-midi-rtc-schema.json). This file is NOT loaded for runtime validation; the custom offline validator in pedals.js does not support $ref/allOf composition. It is the documented source of truth for the 'x_' whitelist enforced by midi-devices/tools/validate_devices.rb and pedals.js lintPedal(). Any 'x_' key not described here is invalid and must fail validation.

controlChangeCommands.description: Extension fields permitted on each Open MIDI RTC controlChangeCommands entry.

x_mandatory.description: Marks a gate CC (e.g. a Mode selector) whose value gates other CCs' x_variants. The default-value mechanism (separate ticket) must keep a non-deletable scene entry for this CC, defaulting to its first possible value. This schema only defines and validates the flag.

x_noop.description: When true on the base entry, the CC is hidden/non-rendered by default (when no x_variants entry matches the current gating values). Use on a variant instead to hide the CC only in specific gate combinations (e.g. a footswitch that exists only in one mode). A no-op control is skipped by the device menu and the web editor; it carries no value widget.

x_variants.description: Constraint-gated overrides of this CC's name/valueRange based on the current value of another CC. Evaluated in array order; first matching constraint wins. When no variant matches (or the gating value is unknown) the entry's base name/valueRange applies. Author a variant only for modes that differ from the default-mode (value 0) base.

x_pc.description: Program Change / preset metadata. Always present in a device file, even when the device has no presets (use count 0).

indexBase.description: 0 if presets are numbered from 0, 1 if numbered from 1.

count.description: Total number of presets (0 if none).

bankSelectMode.description: Bank select scheme used to reach more than 128 presets.

names.description: Optional positional preset names, indexed from indexBase. Read by firmware (assets_parser.c) but rarely used.

additionalInfo.description: Author-only notes; never displayed in device or web UI.

x_midiTrs.description: MIDI TRS wiring type. NOTE: the misspelled key 'x_midiTrsType' is invalid and must be rejected.

ccConstraint.description: A single comparison against another CC's current value.

cc.description: The gating CC number whose current value is tested.

op.description: Comparison operator applied as: (gating CC value) op value.

value.description: The value the gating CC is compared against.

ccVariant.description: An override applied to the parent CC entry when its constraint matches. Omitted fields fall back to the base entry.

name.description: Override display name for this mode. Must stand alone within ~14 chars (additionalInfo is never shown).

x_noop.description: When true, the CC is hidden/non-rendered while this variant's constraint matches (the CC does not exist in this gate combination). A no-op variant needs only its constraint; name/valueRange are ignored.

ccValueRange.description: Same shape as the Open MIDI RTC CCValueRange. Tighten max to the highest useful value (e.g. 1 for a toggle/verb); never 127 for a 0/1 control.

discreteValues.description: Named values. 0 = continuous roller; 1 = single-value verb/trigger; >= 2 = discrete list/dropdown.
